# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""完整打包脚本 - 包含所有依赖（FunASR、torch、stable-ts等）"""
import os
import subprocess
import shutil

APP_NAME = "配音文字核对宝完整版"
VERSION = "1.1.0"

# 1. 清理旧文件
for d in ["dist", "build", "setup_output_full"]:
    if os.path.exists(d):
        try:
            shutil.rmtree(d)
        except:
            pass

# 2. 安装全部依赖
print("正在安装全部依赖...")
subprocess.run(["python", "-m", "pip", "install", "-q",
    "jieba", "python-docx", "requests", "jiwer", "pypinyin",
    "opencc-python-reimplemented", "pyinstaller",
    "torch", "torchaudio", "stable-ts", "pydub"], check=True)

# 3. 打包 exe - 包含所有模块（新增magnifier.py）
print("正在打包完整版 exe（可能需要几分钟）...")
subprocess.run([
    "python", "-m", "PyInstaller",
    "--onefile",
    "--windowed",
    "--name", APP_NAME,
    "--hidden-import", "jieba",
    "--hidden-import", "jieba.posseg",
    "--hidden-import", "docx",
    "--hidden-import", "requests",
    "--hidden-import", "jiwer",
    "--hidden-import", "pypinyin",
    "--hidden-import", "pypinyin.style",
    "--hidden-import", "opencc",
    "--hidden-import", "torch",
    "--hidden-import", "torchaudio",
    "--hidden-import", "stable_whisper",
    "--hidden-import", "whisper",
    "--hidden-import", "pydub",
    "--hidden-import", "pydub.silence",
    "--hidden-import", "numpy",
    "--upx-exclude", "avif*",
    "main.py",
    "config.py",
    "compare.py",
    "transcribe.py",
    "docx_util.py",
    "html_report.py",
    "magnifier.py"
], check=True)

# 4. 创建 Inno Setup 脚本
APP_NAME_ESC = APP_NAME.replace("{", "{{").replace("}", "}}")
iss_content = f"""[Setup]
AppName={APP_NAME}
AppVersion={VERSION}
AppPublisher=配音文字核对宝
DefaultDirName={{{{pf}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}
DefaultGroupName={APP_NAME}
OutputDir=setup_output_full
OutputBaseFilename={APP_NAME_ESC}_Setup_v{VERSION}
Compression=lzma2
SolidCompression=yes
WizardStyle=modern

[Files]
Source: "dist\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"; DestDir: "{{{{app}}}}"; Flags: ignoreversion

[Icons]
Name: "{{{{group}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}"; Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"
Name: "{{{{commondesktop}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}"; Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"

[Run]
Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"; Description: "启动应用"; Flags: postinstall nowait skipifsilent
"""

with open("setup_full.iss", "w", encoding="utf-8-sig") as f:
    f.write(iss_content)

print("\nInno Setup 脚本已生成: setup_full.iss")

# 5. 尝试自动生成安装包
print("\n正在生成安装包...")
try:
    subprocess.run(["iscc", "setup_full.iss"], check=True, capture_output=True)
    print(f"安装包已生成: setup_output_full\{APP_NAME}_Setup_v{VERSION}.exe")
except FileNotFoundError:
    print("\nInno Setup 未安装，请手动安装后运行: iscc setup_full.iss")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"\n生成安装包失败: {e}")
    print("请手动运行: iscc setup_full.iss")

print("\n完成!")
print(f"exe 文件: dist\{APP_NAME}.exe")

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""完整打包脚本 - 包含所有依赖（FunASR、torch、stable-ts等）"""
import os
import subprocess
import shutil

APP_NAME = "配音文字核对宝完整版"
VERSION = "1.1.0"

# 1. 清理旧文件
for d in ["dist", "build", "setup_output_full"]:
    if os.path.exists(d):
        try:
            shutil.rmtree(d)
        except:
            pass

# 2. 安装全部依赖
print("正在安装全部依赖...")
subprocess.run(["python", "-m", "pip", "install", "-q",
    "jieba", "python-docx", "requests", "jiwer", "pypinyin",
    "opencc-python-reimplemented", "pyinstaller", "pyttsx3",
    "torch", "torchaudio", "stable-ts", "pydub"], check=True)

# 3. 打包 exe - 包含所有模块（新增magnifier.py）
print("正在打包完整版 exe（可能需要几分钟）...")
subprocess.run([
    "python", "-m", "PyInstaller",
    "--onefile",
    "--windowed",
    "--name", APP_NAME,
    "--hidden-import", "jieba",
    "--hidden-import", "jieba.posseg",
    "--hidden-import", "docx",
    "--hidden-import", "requests",
    "--hidden-import", "jiwer",
    "--hidden-import", "pypinyin",
    "--hidden-import", "pypinyin.style",
    "--hidden-import", "opencc",
    "--hidden-import", "torch",
    "--hidden-import", "torchaudio",
    "--hidden-import", "stable_whisper",
    "--hidden-import", "whisper",
    "--hidden-import", "pydub",
    "--hidden-import", "pydub.silence",
    "--hidden-import", "numpy",
    "--upx-exclude", "avif*",
    "main.py",
    "config.py",
    "compare.py",
    "transcribe.py",
    "docx_util.py",
    "html_report.py",
    "magnifier.py"
], check=True)

# 4. 创建 Inno Setup 脚本
APP_NAME_ESC = APP_NAME.replace("{", "{{").replace("}", "}}")
iss_content = f"""[Setup]
AppName={APP_NAME}
AppVersion={VERSION}
AppPublisher=配音文字核对宝
DefaultDirName={{{{pf}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}
DefaultGroupName={APP_NAME}
OutputDir=setup_output_full
OutputBaseFilename={APP_NAME_ESC}_Setup_v{VERSION}
Compression=lzma2
SolidCompression=yes
WizardStyle=modern

[Files]
Source: "dist\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"; DestDir: "{{{{app}}}}"; Flags: ignoreversion

[Icons]
Name: "{{{{group}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}"; Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"
Name: "{{{{commondesktop}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}"; Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"

[Run]
Filename: "{{{{app}}}}\{APP_NAME_ESC}.exe"; Description: "启动应用"; Flags: postinstall nowait skipifsilent
"""

with open("setup_full.iss", "w", encoding="utf-8-sig") as f:
    f.write(iss_content)

print("\nInno Setup 脚本已生成: setup_full.iss")

# 5. 尝试自动生成安装包
print("\n正在生成安装包...")
try:
    subprocess.run(["iscc", "setup_full.iss"], check=True, capture_output=True)
    print(f"安装包已生成: setup_output_full\{APP_NAME}_Setup_v{VERSION}.exe")
except FileNotFoundError:
    print("\nInno Setup 未安装，请手动安装后运行: iscc setup_full.iss")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"\n生成安装包失败: {e}")
    print("请手动运行: iscc setup_full.iss")

print("\n完成!")
print(f"exe 文件: dist\{APP_NAME}.exe")

import sys, os, threading, time, tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, filedialog, messagebox, scrolledtext

sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
from config import ASR_PROVIDERS, load_config, save_config, is_valid
from transcribe import transcribe_audio, transcribe_with_timestamps, test_asr
from compare import compare_texts
from docx_util import parse_docx, generate_diff_docx
from html_report import generate_html_report
from magnifier import SimpleMagnifier, create_magnifier_button
from themes import THEMES, THEME_ORDER, get_theme
from error_handler import ErrorHandler
from shortcuts_panel import ShortcutsPanel
from notification import NotificationSound

# Font size configuration
FONT_SIZES = {
    '特大': {'title': 28, 'header': 24, 'label': 20, 'button': 18, 'text': 20},
    '大': {'title': 24, 'header': 20, 'label': 16, 'button': 14, 'text': 16},
    '中': {'title': 20, 'header': 18, 'label': 14, 'button': 12, 'text': 14},
    '小': {'title': 16, 'header': 14, 'label': 12, 'button': 10, 'text': 12},
}
DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE = '大'
DEFAULT_THEME = 'summer'

class App(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('配音文字核对宝')
        self.geometry('900x700')
        self.audio_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.doc_path = tk.StringVar()
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value='就绪')
        self.font_size_var = tk.StringVar(value=DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE)
        self.theme_var = tk.StringVar(value=DEFAULT_THEME)
        self.progress_var = tk.DoubleVar(value=0)
        self.time_remaining_var = tk.StringVar(value='')
        self.step_name_var = tk.StringVar(value='')
        self.process_speed_var = tk.StringVar(value='')
        self.process_start_time = None
        self.processed_chars = 0

        # 处理步骤定义
        self.process_steps = {
            1: {'name': '📝 转写录音', 'range': (0, 50)},
            2: {'name': '🔍 对比内容', 'range': (50, 85)},
            3: {'name': '📄 生成报告', 'range': (85, 100)},
        }

        # 初始化放大镜
        self.magnifier = SimpleMagnifier(self, zoom_level=1.5, lens_size=300)

        self._apply_theme()
        self._build_notebook()

        # 绑定鼠标移动事件用于放大镜跟踪
        self._bind_mouse_tracking()

        # 绑定快捷键
        self._bind_shortcuts()

        # 启用文件拖拽
        self._enable_drag_drop()

    def _get_font(self, element):
        """Get font tuple based on current font size setting."""
        size_key = self.font_size_var.get()
        sizes = FONT_SIZES.get(size_key, FONT_SIZES[DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE])
        base_size = sizes.get(element, 10)
        weight = 'bold' if element in ['title', 'header', 'button', 'tab'] else 'normal'
        return ('', base_size, weight)

    def _apply_font_changes(self):
        """Rebuild notebook to apply font size changes."""
        for widget in self.nb.winfo_children():
            self.nb.forget(widget)
        self._build_home_tab()
        self._build_result_tab()
        self._build_settings_tab()

    def _apply_theme(self):
        """应用当前主题"""
        theme_id = self.theme_var.get()
        theme = get_theme(theme_id)
        colors = theme['colors']

        # 设置主窗口背景
        self.configure(bg=colors['bg'])

        style = ttk.Style()
        style.theme_use('clam')
        style.configure('TNotebook', background=colors['notebook'], borderwidth=0)
        style.configure('TNotebook.Tab', background=colors['tab_bg'], foreground=colors['tab_text'], padding=[12,6], font=('',14,'bold'))
        style.map('TNotebook.Tab', background=[('selected', colors['tab_active'])], foreground=[('selected', colors['tab_active_text'])])
        style.configure('TFrame', background=colors['bg'])
        style.configure('TLabel', background=colors['bg'], foreground=colors['label'])
        style.configure('TButton', background=colors['button'], foreground='white', borderwidth=0, font=('',12,'bold'))
        style.map('TButton', background=[('active', colors['button_hover'])])
        style.configure('TLabelframe', background=colors['bg'], foreground=colors['label'], borderwidth=2, relief='solid')
        style.configure('TLabelframe.Label', background=colors['bg'], foreground=colors['title'], font=('',12,'bold'))

        # 保存当前主题色供其他组件使用
        self.current_colors = colors

    def _on_theme_change(self):
        """主题切换回调"""
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['theme'] = self.theme_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        # 重新应用主题并重建界面
        self._apply_theme()
        self._apply_font_changes()

    def _build_notebook(self):
        self.nb = ttk.Notebook(self)
        self.nb.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=8, pady=8)
        self._build_home_tab()
        self._build_result_tab()
        self._build_settings_tab()

    # ===== Home Tab =====
    def _build_home_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=20)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  首页  ')

        ttk.Label(f, text='选择文件', font=self._get_font('title')).pack(pady=(0,16))

        # 拖拽区域 - 使用当前主题颜色
        colors = self.current_colors
        self.drop_frame = tk.Frame(f, bg=colors['drop_zone'], bd=2, relief='solid',
            highlightbackground=colors['border'], highlightthickness=2)
        self.drop_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=(0, 16), ipady=20)

        drop_label = tk.Label(
            self.drop_frame,
            text='📂 拖拽文件到这里\n支持音频文件 (mp3/wav/m4a/flac)\n和Word文档 (.docx)',
            bg=colors['drop_zone'],
            fg=colors['label'],
            font=('Arial', 14)
        )
        drop_label.pack()

        bf1 = ttk.Frame(f)
        bf1.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        ttk.Button(bf1, text='🎤 选择录音文件', command=self._pick_audio).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Label(bf1, textvariable=self.audio_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)

        bf2 = ttk.Frame(f)
        bf2.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        ttk.Button(bf2, text='📄 选择Word文档', command=self._pick_doc).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Label(bf2, textvariable=self.doc_path, wraplength=400).pack(side='left', padx=8)

        self.start_btn = ttk.Button(f, text='开始对比', command=self._start_compare)
        self.start_btn.pack(pady=20)

        # 进度显示区域
        progress_frame = ttk.Frame(f)
        progress_frame.pack(pady=8)

        # 步骤名称
        ttk.Label(progress_frame, textvariable=self.step_name_var, font=self._get_font('label')).pack(pady=(0,4))

        # 进度条
        self.progress = ttk.Progressbar(progress_frame, mode='determinate', variable=self.progress_var, maximum=100, length=400)
        self.progress.pack()

        # 状态信息行
        status_info_frame = ttk.Frame(progress_frame)
        status_info_frame.pack(pady=(4,0))
        ttk.Label(status_info_frame, textvariable=self.time_remaining_var, font=('', 10)).pack(side='left', padx=(0,8))
        ttk.Label(status_info_frame, textvariable=self.process_speed_var, font=('', 10)).pack(side='left')

        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.status_var, foreground='#666').pack(pady=4)

        # 快捷键提示和帮助按钮
        shortcuts_frame = tk.Frame(f, bg=colors['bg'] if hasattr(self, 'current_colors') else '#FFF8DC')
        shortcuts_frame.pack(pady=12)

        tk.Label(
            shortcuts_frame,
            text='⌨ 快捷键: Ctrl+M 放大镜 | Ctrl++ 放大字体 | Ctrl+- 缩小字体',
            bg=colors['bg'] if hasattr(self, 'current_colors') else '#FFF8DC',
            fg=colors['title'] if hasattr(self, 'current_colors') else '#FF6B6B',
            font=('Arial', 10)
        ).pack(side='left')

        ttk.Button(shortcuts_frame, text='? 帮助', width=6,
            command=lambda: ShortcutsPanel.show(self)).pack(side='left', padx=(10, 0))

    def _pick_audio(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择录音文件',
            filetypes=[('音频文件', '*.wav *.mp3 *.m4a *.flac *.ogg *.wma *.aac'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
        if p: self.audio_path.set(p)

    def _pick_doc(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(title='选择Word文档',
            filetypes=[('Word文档', '*.docx'), ('所有文件', '*.*')])
        if p: self.doc_path.set(p)

    def _start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path.get() or not self.doc_path.get():
            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先选择录音和Word文档')
            return
        # Auto-save current settings before validating
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        config = self.config_data
        if not is_valid(config):
            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先在设置中配置API密钥')
            self.nb.select(2)
            return
        self.start_btn.config(state='disabled')
        self.progress_var.set(0)
        self.time_remaining_var.set('正在初始化...')
        self.process_start_time = time.time()
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, args=(config,), daemon=True).start()

    def _update_progress(self, percent, status_msg, char_count=0):
        """Update progress bar with detailed information."""
        self.progress_var.set(percent)
        self.status_var.set(status_msg)

        # 确定当前步骤
        current_step = None
        for step_id, step_info in self.process_steps.items():
            start, end = step_info['range']
            if start <= percent < end or (percent == 100 and step_id == 3):
                current_step = step_info
                break

        if current_step:
            self.step_name_var.set(current_step['name'])

        # 计算处理速度
        if char_count > 0 and self.process_start_time:
            elapsed = time.time() - self.process_start_time
            if elapsed > 0:
                speed = int(char_count / elapsed)
                self.process_speed_var.set(f'处理速度: {speed} 字/秒')

        # 估算剩余时间
        if percent > 5 and self.process_start_time:
            elapsed = time.time() - self.process_start_time
            total_estimated = elapsed * 100 / percent
            remaining = total_estimated - elapsed
            if remaining > 60:
                self.time_remaining_var.set(f'预计剩余: {int(remaining // 60)}分{int(remaining % 60)}秒')
            else:
                self.time_remaining_var.set(f'预计剩余: {int(remaining)}秒')

    def _do_compare(self, config):
        try:
            # 步骤1: 转写录音 (0-50%)
            self._update_progress(5, '准备转写...')

            # ===== 性能优化：并行处理音频转写和文档解析 =====
            audio_text = None
            doc_text = None
            paragraphs = None
            word_timestamps = None
            doc_error = None
            audio_error = None

            def parse_doc():
                """并行：解析文档"""
                nonlocal paragraphs, doc_text, doc_error
                try:
                    from docx_util import parse_docx
                    paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path.get())
                    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
                except Exception as e:
                    doc_error = e

            def transcribe():
                """并行：转写音频"""
                nonlocal audio_text, word_timestamps, audio_error
                try:
                    word_timestamps = None
                    try:
                        # 尝试使用带时间戳的转写
                        audio_text, word_timestamps = transcribe_with_timestamps(
                            self.audio_path.get(), config, lambda m: self._update_progress(25, m, 0)
                        )
                    except Exception:
                        # 降级到普通转写
                        audio_text = transcribe_audio(
                            self.audio_path.get(), config, lambda m: self._update_progress(25, m, 0)
                        )
                except Exception as e:
                    audio_error = e

            # 启动文档解析线程
            doc_thread = threading.Thread(target=parse_doc, daemon=True)
            doc_thread.start()

            # 主线程处理音频转写
            provider_name = ASR_PROVIDERS[config["asr_provider"]]["name"]
            self._update_progress(15, f'正在转写录音 ({provider_name})...', 0)
            transcribe()
            doc_thread.join(timeout=5)  # 等待文档解析完成

            # 检查错误
            if audio_error:
                raise audio_error
            if doc_error:
                raise doc_error

            # 步骤1完成，更新字符数
            char_count = len(audio_text) if audio_text else 0
            self._update_progress(50, '转写完成', char_count)

            # 步骤2: 对比内容 (50-85%)
            self._update_progress(55, '正在逐字对比内容...', char_count)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, config, word_timestamps=word_timestamps)
            self._update_progress(85, '对比完成', char_count)

            # 步骤3: 生成报告 (85-100%)
            self._update_progress(90, '正在生成对比文档...', char_count)
            output_path = generate_diff_docx(self.doc_path.get(), result.get('diffs', []), summary=result.get('summary'))
            html_path = generate_html_report(result.get('diffs', []), result.get('summary', ''), audio_text, doc_text, self.audio_path.get())

            self._update_progress(100, '完成!', char_count)

            # 播放完成提示音（如果启用）
            if self.sound_enabled_var.get():
                NotificationSound.play_completion_sound()

            self.after(0, lambda: self._show_result(output_path, html_path, result, audio_text, doc_text))
        except Exception as e:
            import traceback; traceback.print_exc()

            # 使用友好的错误处理
            error_code = ErrorHandler.parse_error(e)
            error_msg = str(e)

            self.after(0, lambda: self.status_var.set(f'错误: {error_msg[:50]}'))
            self.after(0, lambda: self.time_remaining_var.set(''))
            self.after(0, lambda: self.step_name_var.set(''))
            self.after(0, lambda: self.process_speed_var.set(''))

            # 显示友好的错误对话框
            if error_code:
                self.after(0, lambda: ErrorHandler.show_error(self, error_code, e))
            else:
                # 如果没有匹配的错误码，显示通用错误
                self.after(0, lambda: ErrorHandler.show_error(self, 'GENERIC_ERROR', e))
        finally:
            self.after(0, self._reset_home)

    def _reset_home(self):
        self.progress_var.set(0)
        self.time_remaining_var.set('')
        self.step_name_var.set('')
        self.process_speed_var.set('')
        self.start_btn.config(state='normal')
        self.status_var.set('就绪')

    # ===== Result Tab =====
    def _build_result_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=16)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  结果  ')
        self.result_frame = f

        self.diff_count_var = tk.StringVar(value='尚未对比')
        self.summary_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.output_path_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.html_path_var = tk.StringVar()

        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.diff_count_var, font=self._get_font('header'), foreground='#e53935').pack(pady=(0,8))
        ttk.Label(f, textvariable=self.summary_var, wraplength=600, foreground='#666', font=self._get_font('label')).pack(pady=(0,12))

        pw = ttk.PanedWindow(f, orient='horizontal')
        pw.pack(fill='both', expand=True)

        # Left pane - Audio transcription with clear button
        lf_frame = ttk.Frame(pw)
        lf_header = ttk.Frame(lf_frame)
        lf_header.pack(fill='x', pady=(4,0))
        ttk.Label(lf_header, text='录音转写', font=self._get_font('label')).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Button(lf_header, text='清除', command=lambda: self.audio_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end'), width=6).pack(side='right', padx=4)
        lf = ttk.LabelFrame(lf_frame)
        lf.pack(fill='both', expand=True)
        self.audio_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(lf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=self._get_font('text'))
        self.audio_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(lf_frame, weight=1)

        # Right pane - Document text with clear button
        rf_frame = ttk.Frame(pw)
        rf_header = ttk.Frame(rf_frame)
        rf_header.pack(fill='x', pady=(4,0))
        ttk.Label(rf_header, text='文档原文', font=self._get_font('label')).pack(side='left')
        ttk.Button(rf_header, text='清除', command=lambda: self.doc_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end'), width=6).pack(side='right', padx=4)
        rf = ttk.LabelFrame(rf_frame)
        rf.pack(fill='both', expand=True)
        self.doc_text_box = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(rf, wrap='word', width=35, height=18, font=self._get_font('text'))
        self.doc_text_box.pack(fill='both', expand=True, padx=4, pady=4)
        pw.add(rf_frame, weight=1)

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(f)
        btn_f.pack(pady=12)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='打开对比文档', command=self._open_result).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='打开HTML报告', command=self._open_html).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='打开所在文件夹', command=self._open_result_folder).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='分享到微信', command=self._share_wechat).pack(side='left', padx=4)
        create_magnifier_button(btn_f, self.magnifier).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        # 快捷键提示
        tk.Label(
            f,
            text='⌨ 快捷键: Ctrl+M 放大镜 | Ctrl++ 放大字体 | Ctrl+- 缩小字体',
            bg='#FFF8DC',
            fg='#FF6B6B',
            font=('Arial', 10)
        ).pack(pady=8)

    def _show_result(self, output_path, html_path, result, audio_text, doc_text):
        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
        self.diff_count_var.set(f'发现 {len(diffs)} 处差异')
        self.summary_var.set(result.get('summary', ''))
        self.output_path_var.set(output_path)
        self.html_path_var.set(html_path)

        self.audio_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.audio_text_box.insert('1.0', audio_text)
        self.doc_text_box.delete('1.0', 'end')
        self.doc_text_box.insert('1.0', doc_text)

        self.nb.select(1)

    def _open_result(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(p)

    def _open_html(self):
        p = self.html_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(p)

    def _open_result_folder(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if p and os.path.exists(p):
            os.startfile(os.path.dirname(p))

    def _share_wechat(self):
        p = self.output_path_var.get()
        if not p or not os.path.exists(p):
            messagebox.showwarning('提示', '请先完成对比生成文档')
            return
        import subprocess
        # Copy file path to clipboard and open WeChat file transfer
        self.clipboard_clear()
        self.clipboard_append(p)
        # Try to open via Windows Share dialog
        try:
            # 使用隐藏窗口的标志
            hide_window = 0x08000000 if sys.platform == 'win32' else 0
            if hasattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW'):
                hide_window = subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW
            subprocess.Popen(['powershell', '-Command',
                f'Start-Process "explorer.exe" "/select,\\"{p}\\""'],
                creationflags=hide_window)
            messagebox.showinfo('分享', f'文件路径已复制到剪贴板，已打开文件所在目录。\n请将文件拖入微信发送。\n\n文件：{os.path.basename(p)}')
        except:
            messagebox.showinfo('分享', f'文件路径已复制到剪贴板，请手动发送到微信。\n\n{p}')

    # ===== Settings Tab =====
    def _build_settings_tab(self):
        f = ttk.Frame(self.nb, padding=12)
        self.nb.add(f, text='  设置  ')

        canvas = tk.Canvas(f, bg='#FFF8DC', highlightthickness=0)
        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(f, orient='vertical', command=canvas.yview)
        self.settings_inner = ttk.Frame(canvas)
        self.settings_inner.bind('<Configure>', lambda e: canvas.configure(scrollregion=canvas.bbox('all')))
        canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=self.settings_inner, anchor='nw')
        canvas.configure(yscrollcommand=scrollbar.set)
        canvas.pack(side='left', fill='both', expand=True)
        scrollbar.pack(side='right', fill='y')
        canvas.bind('<MouseWheel>', lambda e: canvas.yview_scroll(-1*(e.delta//120), 'units'))

        sf = self.settings_inner
        self.config_data = load_config()
        self.asr_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data['asr_provider'])
        self.llm_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu'))
        self.font_size_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data.get('font_size', DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE))
        self.theme_var = tk.StringVar(value=self.config_data.get('theme', DEFAULT_THEME))
        self.sound_enabled_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=self.config_data.get('sound_enabled', True))
        self.key_entries = {}

        # ASR section
        ttk.Label(sf, text='语音转写服务', font=self._get_font('header')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(8,4))
        asr_f = ttk.Frame(sf)
        asr_f.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        for pid, info in ASR_PROVIDERS.items():
            ttk.Radiobutton(asr_f, text=info['name'], variable=self.asr_var, value=pid,
                command=self._on_asr_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        self.asr_keys_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(sf, text='转写服务配置', padding=8)
        self.asr_keys_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        self._render_asr_keys()

        # LLM section
        from config import LLM_PROVIDERS
        ttk.Label(sf, text='大模型服务（国内）', font=self._get_font('header')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(16,4))
        cn_f = ttk.Frame(sf)
        cn_f.pack(fill='x', pady=4)
        for pid, info in LLM_PROVIDERS.items():
            if info['region'] == 'cn':

        theme_f = ttk.Frame(sf)

        for theme_id in THEME_ORDER:
            theme = THEMES[theme_id]
            ttk.Radiobutton(theme_f, text=f"{theme['icon']} {theme['name']}",

        ttk.Label(sf, text='界面字体大小', font=self._get_font('header')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(16,4))

        for size_key in ['特大', '大', '中', '小']:

                command=self._on_font_change).pack(side='left', padx=4)

        ttk.Label(sf, text='🔔 提示音设置', font=self._get_font('header')).pack(anchor='w', pady=(16,4))

        sound_frame.pack(fill='x', pady=4)

        ttk.Checkbutton(

        ).pack(anchor='w', pady=(0, 8))

        # 测试语音按钮

        zoom_frame = ttk.Frame(mag_frame)

        zoom_scale = tk.Scale(

    def _render_asr_keys(self):
        for w in self.asr_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        info = ASR_PROVIDERS[pid]

        # Builtin providers don't need key input
        if info.get('builtin'):
            ttk.Label(self.asr_keys_frame, text='✓ 使用内置密钥，无需配置', foreground='green').pack(anchor='w', pady=8)
            btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.asr_keys_frame)
            btn_f.pack(pady=4)
            ttk.Button(btn_f, text='测试连接', command=self._test_asr).pack()
            return

        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        for field in info['fields']:
            label_map = {'key': 'API Key / AccessKey ID', 'secret': 'Secret', 'appKey': 'AppKey', 'region': 'Region'}
            ttk.Label(self.asr_keys_frame, text=label_map.get(field, field)).pack(anchor='w')
            e = ttk.Entry(self.asr_keys_frame, width=50, show='*' if field in ('key','secret') else '')
            e.insert(0, keys.get(field, ''))
            e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
            self.key_entries[f'asr_{pid}_{field}'] = e

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.asr_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='测试连接', command=self._test_asr).pack()

    def _render_llm_keys(self):
        from config import LLM_PROVIDERS
        for w in self.llm_keys_frame.winfo_children(): w.destroy()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS[pid]
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})

        ttk.Label(self.llm_keys_frame, text='API Key').pack(anchor='w')
        e = ttk.Entry(self.llm_keys_frame, width=50, show='*')
        e.insert(0, keys.get('key', ''))
        e.pack(fill='x', pady=(0,4))
        self.key_entries[f'llm_{pid}_key'] = e

        btn_f = ttk.Frame(self.llm_keys_frame)
        btn_f.pack(pady=4)
        ttk.Button(btn_f, text='测试连接', command=self._test_llm).pack()

    def _on_asr_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_asr_keys()

    def _on_llm_change(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self._render_llm_keys()

    def _on_font_change(self):
        """Handle font size change - rebuild UI with new font size."""
        # Save the current font setting
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['font_size'] = self.font_size_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        # Rebuild UI
        self._apply_font_changes()

    def _collect_keys(self):
        """Collect current key entries into config_data before switching provider."""
        for k, e in list(self.key_entries.items()):
            try:
                val = e.get()
            except:
                continue
            parts = k.split('_', 2)
            if parts[0] == 'asr':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
            elif parts[0] == 'llm':
                pid, field = parts[1], parts[2]
                self.config_data.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(pid, {})[field] = val
        self.key_entries.clear()

    def _test_asr(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.asr_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        ok, msg = test_asr(pid, keys)
        messagebox.showinfo('成功' if ok else '失败', msg)

    def _test_llm(self):
        from compare import test_llm
        self._collect_keys()
        pid = self.llm_var.get()
        keys = self.config_data.get('llm_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
        ok, msg = test_llm(pid, keys.get('key', ''))
        messagebox.showinfo('连通性测试', '✓ ' + msg if ok else '✗ ' + msg)

    def _test_sound(self):
        """测试语音播报"""
        try:
            NotificationSound.test_sound()
            self.status_var.set('正在播放测试语音...')
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showwarning('提示', f'语音播放失败：{str(e)}\n请确保已安装pyttsx3库')

    # ===== Magnifier Methods =====
    def _bind_shortcuts(self):
        """绑定快捷键"""
        # F1: 显示快捷键帮助
        self.bind('<F1>', lambda e: ShortcutsPanel.show(self))
        # Ctrl+M: 切换放大镜
        self.bind('<Control-m>', lambda e: self._toggle_magnifier_shortcut())
        self.bind('<Control-M>', lambda e: self._toggle_magnifier_shortcut())
        # Ctrl+Plus: 增大字体
        self.bind('<Control-plus>', lambda e: self._increase_font())
        self.bind('<Control-equal>', lambda e: self._increase_font())
        # Ctrl+Minus: 减小字体
        self.bind('<Control-minus>', lambda e: self._decrease_font())
        # Ctrl+1/2/3: 切换标签页
        self.bind('<Control-1>', lambda e: self._switch_tab(0))
        self.bind('<Control-2>', lambda e: self._switch_tab(1))
        self.bind('<Control-3>', lambda e: self._switch_tab(2))
        # F5: 开始对比
        self.bind('<F5>', lambda e: self._start_compare())
        # Ctrl+O: 打开文件
        self.bind('<Control-o>', lambda e: self._pick_audio())
        self.bind('<Control-O>', lambda e: self._pick_audio())

    def _switch_tab(self, index):
        """切换到指定标签页"""
        if hasattr(self, 'nb'):
            self.nb.select(index)

    def _toggle_magnifier_shortcut(self):
        """快捷键切换放大镜"""
        self.magnifier.toggle()
        if self.magnifier.is_active:
            self.status_var.set('放大镜已打开 (Ctrl+M 关闭)')
        else:
            self.status_var.set('放大镜已关闭')

    def _increase_font(self):
        """增大字体"""
        sizes = ['小', '中', '大', '特大']
        current = self.font_size_var.get()
        try:
            idx = sizes.index(current)
            if idx < len(sizes) - 1:
                self.font_size_var.set(sizes[idx + 1])
                self._apply_font_changes()
                self.status_var.set(f'字体已调整为: {sizes[idx + 1]} (Ctrl +/- 调整)')
        except:
            pass

    def _decrease_font(self):
        """减小字体"""
        sizes = ['小', '中', '大', '特大']
        current = self.font_size_var.get()
        try:
            idx = sizes.index(current)
            if idx > 0:
                self.font_size_var.set(sizes[idx - 1])
                self._apply_font_changes()
                self.status_var.set(f'字体已调整为: {sizes[idx - 1]} (Ctrl +/- 调整)')
        except:
            pass

    def _on_zoom_change(self, value):
        """Handle zoom level change."""
        self.magnifier.set_zoom(float(value))

    def _toggle_mouse_tracking(self):
        """Toggle mouse tracking for magnifier."""
        self.mouse_tracking_var.set(not self.mouse_tracking_var.get())
        if self.mouse_tracking_var.get():
            self.magnifier.show()
            self.status_var.set('放大镜已启用，鼠标移动将自动跟踪')
        else:
            self.magnifier.hide()
            self.status_var.set('放大镜已关闭')

    def _bind_mouse_tracking(self):
        """Bind mouse tracking events."""
        self._tracking_enabled = False

        def on_mouse_move(event):
            if self.mouse_tracking_var.get() and self.magnifier.is_active:
                # 获取鼠标下的控件
                x, y = event.x_root, event.y_root
                widget = event.widget

                # 更新放大镜内容
                try:
                    self.magnifier.magnify_widget(widget)
                except:
                    pass

        # 绑定鼠标移动事件到主窗口
        self.bind('<Motion>', on_mouse_move)

        # 也绑定到notebook以跟踪子控件
        def bind_to_children(w):
            try:
                w.bind('<Motion>', on_mouse_move)
                for child in w.winfo_children():
                    bind_to_children(child)
            except:
                pass

        self.after(1000, lambda: bind_to_children(self))

    # ===== Drag & Drop Methods =====
    def _enable_drag_drop(self):
        """启用文件拖拽功能"""
        try:
            # 尝试使用 tkinterdnd2 (推荐)
            from tkinterdnd2 import DND_FILES, TkinterDnD
            # 需要先初始化 TkinterDnD
            TkinterDnD().load_tk()
            self.drop_target_register(DND_FILES)
            self.dnd_bind('<<Drop>>', self._on_drop)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragEnter>>', self._on_drag_enter)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragLeave>>', self._on_drag_leave)
        except Exception:
            # 如果没有 tkinterdnd2 或初始化失败，尝试使用 Windows 原生支持
            self._setup_windows_drop()

    def _setup_windows_drop(self):
        """设置 Windows 原生拖拽支持"""
        try:
            import ctypes
            from ctypes import wintypes

            # 定义 Windows API
            WM_DROPFILES = 0x233
            GWL_WNDPROC = -4

            # 获取窗口句柄
            hwnd = wintypes.HWND(int(self.winfo_id()))

            # 定义窗口过程类型
            WNDPROC = ctypes.WINFUNCTYPE(wintypes.LPARAM, wintypes.HWND,
                                        wintypes.UINT, wintypes.WPARAM, wintypes.LPARAM)

            # 保存原始窗口过程
            self._oldwndproc = ctypes.windll.user32.GetWindowLongW(hwnd, GWL_WNDPROC)

            # 定义新窗口过程
            def new_wndproc(hwnd, msg, wparam, lparam):
                if msg == WM_DROPFILES:
                    # 处理文件拖放
                    hdrop = wparam
                    # 获取文件数量
                    file_count = ctypes.windll.shell32.DragQueryFileW(hdrop, 0xFFFFFFFF, None, 0)

                    files = []
                    for i in range(file_count):
                        # 获取文件名长度
                        length = ctypes.windll.shell32.DragQueryFileW(hdrop, i, None, 0)
                        # 分配缓冲区
                        buffer = ctypes.create_unicode_buffer(length + 1)
                        # 获取文件名
                        ctypes.windll.shell32.DragQueryFileW(hdrop, i, buffer, length + 1)
                        files.append(buffer.value)

                    # 结束拖拽
                    ctypes.windll.shell32.DragFinish(hdrop)

                    # 处理文件
                    if files:
                        self.after(0, lambda f=files: self._process_dropped_files(f))
                    return 0

                # 调用原始窗口过程
                return ctypes.windll.user32.CallWindowProcW(
                    self._oldwndproc, hwnd, msg, wparam, lparam)

            # 设置新窗口过程
            self._newwndproc = WNDPROC(new_wndproc)
            ctypes.windll.user32.SetWindowLongW(hwnd, GWL_WNDPROC, self._newwndproc)

            # 设置窗口接受拖拽
            WS_EX_ACCEPTFILES = 0x00000010
            style = ctypes.windll.user32.GetWindowLongW(hwnd, -20)  # GWL_EXSTYLE
            ctypes.windll.user32.SetWindowLongW(hwnd, -20, style | WS_EX_ACCEPTFILES)

        except Exception as e:
            # 失败则使用简单的点击区域
            pass

    def _on_drop(self, event):
        """处理文件拖放事件 (tkinterdnd2)"""
        try:
            # 解析文件列表
            data = event.data
            # 去除花括号和空格
            data = data.strip('{}').strip()
            # 分割文件路径
            files = [f.strip() for f in data.split('}') if f.strip()]
            self._process_dropped_files(files)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_var.set(f'拖拽处理失败: {str(e)[:50]}')

    def _on_drag_enter(self, event):
        """拖拽进入时的视觉效果"""
        if hasattr(self, 'drop_frame'):
            colors = self.current_colors
            self.drop_frame.config(bg=colors['notebook'], highlightthickness=3)

    def _on_drag_leave(self, event):
        """拖拽离开时的视觉效果"""
        if hasattr(self, 'drop_frame'):
            colors = self.current_colors
            self.drop_frame.config(bg=colors['drop_zone'], highlightthickness=2)

    def _process_dropped_files(self, files):
        """处理拖放的文件列表"""
        if not files:
            return

        processed = 0
        for filepath in files:
            if not filepath:
                continue

            # 清理路径
            filepath = filepath.strip().strip('{}').strip('"')

            if not os.path.exists(filepath):
                continue

            # 检查文件扩展名
            ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

            # 音频文件扩展名
            audio_exts = {'.wav', '.mp3', '.m4a', '.flac', '.ogg', '.wma', '.aac', '.amr', '.opus'}
            # 文档文件扩展名
            doc_exts = {'.docx', '.doc', '.txt', '.rtf'}

            if ext in audio_exts:
                self.audio_path.set(filepath)
                self.status_var.set(f'✓ 已添加音频: {os.path.basename(filepath)}')
                processed += 1
            elif ext in doc_exts:
                self.doc_path.set(filepath)
                self.status_var.set(f'✓ 已添加文档: {os.path.basename(filepath)}')
                processed += 1
            else:
                # 未知文件类型，尝试自动识别
                self._auto_detect_file_type(filepath)
                processed += 1

        # 更新拖拽区域显示
        self._update_drop_display()

        if processed > 0:
            self.status_var.set(f'✓ 已添加 {processed} 个文件，可以开始对比')

    def _auto_detect_file_type(self, filepath):
        """自动识别文件类型"""
        filename = os.path.basename(filepath).lower()

        # 音频相关关键词
        audio_keywords = ['录音', '音频', '声音', 'voice', 'audio', 'sound', 'record']
        # 文档相关关键词
        doc_keywords = ['文档', '原文', '文案', 'doc', 'text', 'script', '稿']

        audio_score = sum(1 for kw in audio_keywords if kw in filename)
        doc_score = sum(1 for kw in doc_keywords if kw in filename)

        # 根据文件大小判断
        try:
            file_size = os.path.getsize(filepath)
            if file_size > 1024 * 100:  # 大于100KB可能是音频
                audio_score += 1
            else:
                doc_score += 1
        except:
            pass

        if audio_score > doc_score:
            self.audio_path.set(filepath)
        elif doc_score > audio_score:
            self.doc_path.set(filepath)
        else:
            # 无法确定，默认作为音频
            self.audio_path.set(filepath)

    def _update_drop_display(self):
        """更新拖拽区域显示"""
        audio_name = os.path.basename(self.audio_path.get()) if self.audio_path.get() else ''
        doc_name = os.path.basename(self.doc_path.get()) if self.doc_path.get() else ''

        for widget in self.drop_frame.winfo_children():
            if audio_name or doc_name:
                status_text = '✓ 已添加文件\n'
                if audio_name:
                    name = audio_name if len(audio_name) <= 25 else audio_name[:22] + '...'
                    status_text += f'🎤 {name}\n'
                if doc_name:
                    name = doc_name if len(doc_name) <= 25 else doc_name[:22] + '...'
                    status_text += f'📄 {name}'
            else:
                status_text = '📂 拖拽文件到这里\n音频 (mp3/wav/m4a) | 文档 (.docx)'
            widget.config(text=status_text)

        def on_mouse_move(event):
            if self.mouse_tracking_var.get() and self.magnifier.is_active:
                # 获取鼠标下的控件
                x, y = event.x_root, event.y_root
                widget = event.widget

                # 更新放大镜内容
                try:
                    self.magnifier.magnify_widget(widget)
                except:
                    pass

        # 绑定鼠标移动事件到主窗口
        self.bind('<Motion>', on_mouse_move)

        # 也绑定到notebook以跟踪子控件
        def bind_to_children(w):
            try:
                w.bind('<Motion>', on_mouse_move)
                for child in w.winfo_children():
                    bind_to_children(child)
            except:
                pass

        self.after(1000, lambda: bind_to_children(self))

    def _save_settings(self):
        self._collect_keys()
        self.config_data['asr_provider'] = self.asr_var.get()
        self.config_data['llm_provider'] = self.llm_var.get()
        self.config_data['font_size'] = self.font_size_var.get()
        self.config_data['theme'] = self.theme_var.get()
        self.config_data['sound_enabled'] = self.sound_enabled_var.get()
        save_config(self.config_data)
        self.status_var.set('设置已保存')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app = App()
    app.mainloop()

1→import os, sys, tempfile, subprocess, requests, hmac, hashlib, base64, json, time, atexit
     2→from urllib.parse import quote
     3→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     4→from typing import List, Callable, Optional, Dict, Any
     5→import opencc
     6→
     7→_funasr_proc = None
     8→_converter = None
     9→
    10→# ===== 临时文件管理 =====
    11→_temp_files: set = set()
    12→
    13→def _make_temp_file(suffix: str = '') -> str:
    14→    """创建临时文件并注册清理"""
    15→    fd, path = tempfile.mkstemp(suffix=suffix)
    16→    os.close(fd)
    17→    _temp_files.add(path)
    18→    return path
    19→
    20→def _cleanup_temp_files():
    21→    """清理所有临时文件"""
    22→    for filepath in list(_temp_files):
    23→        try:
    24→            if os.path.exists(filepath):
    25→                os.remove(filepath)
    26→        except Exception:
    27→            pass
    28→    _temp_files.clear()
    29→
    30→# 注册退出时清理
    31→atexit.register(_cleanup_temp_files)
    32→
    33→# 隐藏子进程窗口的标志 (Windows: 0x08000000, 其他: 0)
    34→_HIDE_WINDOW = 0x08000000 if sys.platform == 'win32' else 0
    35→# 同时设置 subprocess.CREATE_NO_WINDOW (如果可用)
    36→if hasattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW'):
    37→    _HIDE_WINDOW = getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', _HIDE_WINDOW)
    38→
    39→def _get_converter():
    40→    """Get OpenCC converter instance for Traditional to Simplified Chinese."""
    41→    global _converter
    42→    if _converter is None:
    43→        try:
    44→            import opencc
    45→            _converter = opencc.OpenCC('t2s')  # Traditional to Simplified
    46→        except ImportError:
    47→            _converter = None
    48→    return _converter
    49→
    50→def _to_simplified(text):
    51→    """Convert Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese."""
    52→    converter = _get_converter()
    53→    if converter:
    54→        try:
    55→            return converter.convert(text)
    56→        except:
    57→            pass
    58→    return text  # Return original if conversion fails
    59→
    60→def preprocess_audio(filepath: str, progress_cb: Optional[Callable] = None, skip_if_compatible: bool = True) -> str:
    61→    """Normalize volume and reduce noise using ffmpeg. Returns path to processed file.
    62→
    63→    性能优化：
    64→    - 如果音频已是16kHz单声道，可跳过预处理
    65→    - 使用更快的ffmpeg参数
    66→    """
    67→    # 如果允许跳过且音频已符合格式要求，直接返回
    68→    if skip_if_compatible:
    69→        try:
    70→            # 快速检查音频格式
    71→            probe_result = subprocess.run(
    72→                ['ffprobe', '-v', 'quiet', '-print_format', 'json', '-show_streams', filepath],
    73→                capture_output=True, text=True, creationflags=_HIDE_WINDOW, timeout=5
    74→            )
    75→            streams = json.loads(probe_result.stdout).get('streams', [])
    76→            for stream in streams:
    77→                if stream.get('codec_type') == 'audio':
    78→                    sample_rate = int(stream.get('sample_rate', 0))
    79→                    channels = int(stream.get('channels', 0))
    80→                    # 如果已经是16kHz单声道，跳过预处理
    81→                    if sample_rate == 16000 and channels == 1:
    82→                        if progress_cb:
    83→                            progress_cb('音频格式检查完成，跳过预处理')
    84→                        return filepath
    85→        except:
    86→            pass  # 检查失败，继续预处理
    87→
    88→    if progress_cb:
    89→        progress_cb('正在预处理音频（快速模式）...')
    90→
    91→    out = _make_temp_file('_vdc_preprocessed.wav')
    92→
    93→    # 简化的音频处理：只转格式，不做复杂处理（更快）
    94→    subprocess.run([
    95→        'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
    96→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000',  # 只设置单声道和采样率
    97→        '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',      # 使用PCM编码（更快）
    98→        out
    99→    ], capture_output=True, creationflags=_HIDE_WINDOW)
   100→
   101→    return out if os.path.exists(out) else filepath
   102→
   103→def _ensure_funasr_running(progress_cb: Optional[Callable] = None):
   104→    """Auto-start FunASR server if not running.
   105→
   106→    性能优化：
   107→    - 更快的健康检查间隔
   108→    - 并行启动和检查
   109→    - 模型预热
   110→    """
   111→    global _funasr_proc
   112→    try:
   113→        # 快速健康检查（1秒超时）
   114→        r = requests.get('http://localhost:8765/health', timeout=1)
   115→        if r.status_code == 200:
   116→            return
   117→    except:
   118→        pass
   119→
   120→    if progress_cb:
   121→        progress_cb('正在启动FunASR服务...')
   122→
   123→    # Try to start the server
   124→    python_exe = os.path.expanduser('~/funasr-venv/Scripts/python.exe')
   125→    server_script = os.path.expanduser('~/.clawdbot/skills/funasr-transcribe/scripts/server.py')
   126→    if not os.path.exists(python_exe) or not os.path.exists(server_script):
   127→        raise Exception('FunASR环境未安装，请检查 ~/funasr-venv 和 ~/.clawdbot/skills/funasr-transcribe')
   128→
   129→    _funasr_proc = subprocess.Popen(
   130→        [python_exe, server_script],
   131→        stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
   132→        creationflags=_HIDE_WINDOW,
   133→    )
   134→
   135→    # 快速等待服务就绪（最多30秒）
   136→    for i in range(30):
   137→        time.sleep(0.5)  # 更短的检查间隔
   138→        try:
   139→            r = requests.get('http://localhost:8765/health', timeout=1)
   140→            if r.status_code == 200:
   141→                if progress_cb and i > 5:
   142→                    progress_cb('FunASR服务已就绪')
   143→                return
   144→        except:
   145→            pass
   146→
   147→    raise Exception('FunASR服务启动超时，请手动运行:\n' + python_exe + ' ' + server_script)
   148→
   149→def transcribe_audio(filepath, config, progress_cb=None):
   150→    from config import get_builtin_keys
   151→    pid = config['asr_provider']
   152→    keys = config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(pid, {})
   153→    # Use builtin keys if available
   154→    if not keys:
   155→        keys = get_builtin_keys(pid)
   156→    # Preprocess audio
   157→    if config.get('preprocess', True):
   158→        filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)
   159→    if pid == 'funasr':
   160→        return _transcribe_funasr(filepath, progress_cb)
   161→    elif pid == 'aliyun':
   162→        return _transcribe_chunked(filepath, lambda f: _transcribe_aliyun(f, keys), progress_cb)
   163→    elif pid == 'baidu' or pid == 'baidu_builtin':
   164→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, keys, progress_cb)
   165→    elif pid == 'groq_whisper':
   166→        return _transcribe_ffmpeg_chunked(filepath, lambda f: _transcribe_groq(f, keys['key']), progress_cb)
   167→    elif pid == 'openai_whisper':
   168→        return _transcribe_ffmpeg_chunked(filepath, lambda f: _transcribe_whisper(f, keys['key']), progress_cb)
   169→    else:
   170→        raise Exception(f'{pid} 转写暂未实现')
   171→
   172→def transcribe_with_timestamps(filepath, config, progress_cb=None):
   173→    """Transcribe with word-level timestamps using stable-ts."""
   174→    if config.get('preprocess', True):
   175→        filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)
   176→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在加载stable-ts模型（首次较慢）...')
   177→    import stable_whisper
   178→    model = stable_whisper.load_model('base')
   179→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在转写并对齐时间戳...')
   180→    result = model.transcribe(filepath, language='zh')
   181→    words = []
   182→    for seg in result.segments:
   183→        for w in seg.words:
   184→            words.append({'word': w.word.strip(), 'start': w.start, 'end': w.end, 'confidence': getattr(w, 'probability', 0.0)})
   185→    text = ''.join(w['word'] for w in words)
   186→    return text, words
   187→
   188→# --- FunASR (local server) ---
   189→def _transcribe_funasr(filepath, progress_cb=None):
   190→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在启动FunASR服务...')
   191→    _ensure_funasr_running()
   192→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在调用本地FunASR服务...')
   193→    r = requests.post('http://localhost:8765/transcribe',
   194→        json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)
   195→    data = r.json()
   196→    if data.get('success'):
   197→        text = data.get('text', '')
   198→        # Convert Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese
   199→        text = _to_simplified(text)
   200→        return text
   201→    raise Exception(data.get('error', '转写失败'))
   202→
   203→# --- Chunked transcription for cloud APIs ---
   204→def _transcribe_chunked(filepath, transcribe_fn, progress_cb=None):
   205→    from pydub import AudioSegment
   206→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在加载音频...')
   207→    audio = AudioSegment.from_file(filepath)
   208→    duration_s = len(audio) / 1000
   209→
   210→    if duration_s <= 60:
   211→        if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在转写...')
   212→        return transcribe_fn(filepath)
   213→
   214→    # Split into chunks at silence points
   215→    from pydub.silence import split_on_silence
   216→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('长语音，正在分块...')
   217→    chunks = split_on_silence(audio, min_silence_len=500, silence_thresh=-40, keep_silence=300)
   218→
   219→    # Merge small chunks, split large ones to keep each ≤ 55s
   220→    merged = []
   221→    buf = AudioSegment.empty()
   222→    for c in chunks:
   223→        if len(buf) + len(c) <= 55000:
   224→            buf += c
   225→        else:
   226→            if len(buf) > 0:
   227→                merged.append(buf)
   228→            if len(c) > 55000:
   229→                # Hard split
   230→                for i in range(0, len(c), 55000):
   231→                    merged.append(c[i:i+55000])
   232→            else:
   233→                buf = c
   234→                continue
   235→            buf = AudioSegment.empty()
   236→    if len(buf) > 0:
   237→        merged.append(buf)
   238→
   239→    if not merged:
   240→        merged = [audio]
   241→
   242→    results = []
   243→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   244→    for i, chunk in enumerate(merged):
   245→        if progress_cb: progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(merged)}...')
   246→        tmp = os.path.join(tmpdir, f'chunk_{i}.wav')
   247→        chunk.export(tmp, format='wav')
   248→        results.append(transcribe_fn(tmp))
   249→        os.remove(tmp)
   250→
   251→    return ' '.join(results)
   252→
   253→# --- FFmpeg-based chunked transcription (no pydub dependency) ---
   254→def _transcribe_ffmpeg_chunked(filepath, transcribe_fn, progress_cb=None):
   255→    if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在检测音频时长...')
   256→    # Get duration via ffprobe
   257→    result = subprocess.run(['ffprobe', '-v', 'quiet', '-print_format', 'json', '-show_format', filepath],
   258→        capture_output=True, text=True, creationflags=getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', 0))
   259→    duration_s = float(json.loads(result.stdout).get('format', {}).get('duration', 0))
   260→
   261→    if duration_s <= 55:
   262→        if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在转写...')
   263→        return transcribe_fn(filepath)
   264→
   265→    # Split into 55-second chunks using ffmpeg
   266→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   267→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   268→    subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
   269→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern],
   270→        capture_output=True, creationflags=getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', 0))
   271→
   272→    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   273→    if not chunks:
   274→        if progress_cb: progress_cb('正在转写...')
   275→        return transcribe_fn(filepath)
   276→
   277→    results = []
   278→    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
   279→        if progress_cb: progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
   280→        results.append(transcribe_fn(chunk))
   281→        os.remove(chunk)
   282→    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   283→    return ' '.join(results)
   284→
   285→# --- Aliyun ASR ---
   286→def _transcribe_aliyun(filepath, keys):
   287→    ak_id, ak_secret, app_key = keys.get('key',''), keys.get('secret',''), keys.get('appKey','')
   288→    if not all([ak_id, ak_secret, app_key]):
   289→        raise Exception('请配置阿里云 AccessKey ID、Secret 和 AppKey')
   290→
   291→    # Get token
   292→    nonce = os.urandom(8).hex()
   293→    ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')
   294→    params = {
   295→        'AccessKeyId': ak_id, 'Action': 'CreateToken', 'Format': 'JSON',
   296→        'RegionId': 'cn-shanghai', 'SignatureMethod': 'HMAC-SHA1',
   297→        'SignatureNonce': nonce, 'SignatureVersion': '1.0',
   298→        'Timestamp': ts, 'Version': '2019-02-28',
   299→    }
   300→    canon = '&'.join(f'{quote(k, safe="")}={quote(params[k], safe="")}' for k in sorted(params))
   301→    sts = f'GET&{quote("/", safe="")}&{quote(canon, safe="")}'
   302→    sig = base64.b64encode(hmac.new((ak_secret + '&').encode(), sts.encode(), hashlib.sha1).digest()).decode()
   303→    params['Signature'] = sig
   304→    query = '&'.join(f'{quote(k, safe="")}={quote(v, safe="")}' for k, v in params.items())
   305→    resp = requests.get(f'https://nls-meta.cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com/?{query}', timeout=10)
   306→    token = resp.json().get('Token', {}).get('Id')
   307→    if not token:
   308→        raise Exception('获取阿里云Token失败: ' + resp.text[:200])
   309→
   310→    # Transcribe
   311→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   312→        audio_data = f.read()
   313→    url = f'https://nls-gateway-cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com/stream/v1/asr?appkey={app_key}&format=wav&sample_rate=16000&enable_punctuation_prediction=true&enable_inverse_text_normalization=true'
   314→    resp = requests.post(url, headers={'X-NLS-Token': token, 'Content-Type': 'application/octet-stream'}, data=audio_data, timeout=60)
   315→    result = resp.json()
   316→    if result.get('status') == 20000000 and result.get('result'):
   317→        return result['result']
   318→    raise Exception('阿里云识别失败: ' + json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False)[:200])
   319→
   320→# --- Baidu ASR chunked (with proper format conversion) ---
   321→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, keys, progress_cb=None):
   322→    """Handle Baidu ASR with automatic chunking for long audio."""
   323→    # First, convert to proper format (16kHz, mono)
   324→    tmp_normalized = os.path.join(tempfile.gettempdir(), 'baidu_normalized.wav')
   325→    if progress_cb:
   326→        progress_cb('正在转换音频格式...')
   327→    subprocess.run([
   328→        'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
   329→        '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
   330→        '-ac', '1',
   331→        '-ar', '16000',
   332→        tmp_normalized
   333→    ], capture_output=True, creationflags=getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', 0))
   334→
   335→    if not os.path.exists(tmp_normalized):
   336→        # Fallback: use original
   337→        tmp_normalized = filepath
   338→
   339→    # Get duration
   340→    result = subprocess.run(['ffprobe', '-v', 'quiet', '-print_format', 'json', '-show_format', tmp_normalized],
   341→        capture_output=True, text=True, creationflags=getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', 0))
   342→    try:
   343→        duration_s = float(json.loads(result.stdout).get('format', {}).get('duration', 0))
   344→    except:
   345→        duration_s = 0
   346→
   347→    # If short enough, transcribe directly
   348→    if duration_s <= 55:
   349→        if progress_cb:
   350→            progress_cb('正在转写...')
   351→        text = _transcribe_baidu_single(tmp_normalized, keys)
   352→        if tmp_normalized != filepath and os.path.exists(tmp_normalized):
   353→            os.remove(tmp_normalized)
   354→        return text
   355→
   356→    # Long audio: split into 55-second chunks
   357→    if progress_cb:
   358→        progress_cb(f'长语音({int(duration_s)}秒)，正在分段...')
   359→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   360→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   361→    subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-i', tmp_normalized, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
   362→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern],
   363→        capture_output=True, creationflags=getattr(subprocess, 'CREATE_NO_WINDOW', 0))
   364→
   365→    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   366→
   367→    if not chunks:
   368→        if tmp_normalized != filepath and os.path.exists(tmp_normalized):
   369→            os.remove(tmp_normalized)
   370→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   371→
   372→    results = []
   373→    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
   374→        if progress_cb:
   375→            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
   376→        try:
   377→            text = _transcribe_baidu_single(chunk, keys)
   378→            results.append(text)
   379→        except Exception as e:
   380→            # Continue with next chunk on error
   381→            results.append(f'[{e}]')
   382→        os.remove(chunk)
   383→
   384→    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   385→    if tmp_normalized != filepath and os.path.exists(tmp_normalized):
   386→        os.remove(tmp_normalized)
   387→
   388→    return ' '.join(results)
   389→
   390→def _transcribe_baidu_single(filepath, keys):
   391→    """Transcribe a single audio file (must be <= 60s)."""
   392→    api_key, secret_key = keys.get('key', ''), keys.get('secret', '')
   393→    app_id = keys.get('app_id', '')
   394→    if not api_key or not secret_key:
   395→        raise Exception('请配置百度 API Key 和 Secret Key')
   396→
   397→    # Get access token with caching
   398→    if not hasattr(_transcribe_baidu_single, '_token'):
   399→        _transcribe_baidu_single._token = None
   400→        _transcribe_baidu_single._token_keys = None
   401→
   402→    if _transcribe_baidu_single._token_keys != (api_key, secret_key):
   403→        resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   404→            params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
   405→        data = resp.json()
   406→        token = data.get('access_token')
   407→        if not token:
   408→            raise Exception('获取百度Token失败: ' + resp.text[:200])
   409→        _transcribe_baidu_single._token = token
   410→        _transcribe_baidu_single._token_keys = (api_key, secret_key)
   411→    else:
   412→        token = _transcribe_baidu_single._token
   413→
   414→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   415→        audio_data = f.read()
   416→
   417→    # Check audio length
   418→    audio_len = len(audio_data)
   419→    if audio_len > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
   420→        raise Exception(f'音频文件过大({audio_len/1024/1024:.1f}MB)，请使用60秒以内的音频')
   421→
   422→    # dev_pid: 1537=普通话(支持简单的英文识别), 1737=英语
   423→    payload = {
   424→        'format': 'wav',
   425→        'rate': 16000,
   426→        'channel': 1,
   427→        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare',
   428→        'token': token,
   429→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   430→        'len': audio_len,
   431→        'dev_pid': 1537  # 普通话
   432→    }
   433→    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api',
   434→        json=payload, timeout=60)
   435→    result = resp.json()
   436→    err_no = result.get('err_no', -1)
   437→    if err_no == 0:
   438→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   439→
   440→    # 详细的错误码说明
   441→    error_messages = {
   442→        3301: '音频质量过差，无法识别',
   443→        3302: '鉴权失败，请检查API Key',
   444→        3303: '语音服务器后端问题',
   445→        3307: '音频时长过长，超过60秒限制',
   446→        3308: '音频过长',
   447→        3309: '音频格式问题',
   448→        3310: '音频采样率不正确',
   449→        3311: '音频编码不正确',
   450→        3312: '音频参数不正确',
   451→        3333: '服务器错误',
   452→        3001: '语音识别服务器内部错误',
   453→        3003: '语音识别后端系统错误',
   454→    }
   455→    err_msg = error_messages.get(err_no, result.get('err_msg', '未知错误'))
   456→    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{err_no}]: {err_msg}')
   457→
   458→# --- Groq Whisper ---
   459→def _transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key):
   460→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   461→        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   462→            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   463→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   464→            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json'}, timeout=120)
   465→    data = resp.json()

   469→
   470→# --- OpenAI Whisper ---

input.new_string:
def _to_simplified(text):
    """Convert Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese.
    English text will be preserved as-is.
    """
    import re

    # 统计中文字符（不包括标点符号）
    chinese_chars = len(re.findall(r'[\u4e00-\u9fff]', text))

    # 统计总字符数（不包括空格）
    total_chars = len(re.sub(r'\s+', '', text))

    # 如果没有中文字符或中文占比少于15%，认为是英文，不转换
    if total_chars == 0 or chinese_chars == 0 or chinese_chars / total_chars < 0.15:
        # 英文为主或无中文，不转换
        return text

    # 包含足够比例的中文，进行繁简转换
    converter = _get_converter()
    if converter:
        try:
            return converter.convert(text)
        except:
            pass
    return text  # Return original if conversion fails

self.after(1000, lambda: bind_to_children(self))

    # ===== Drag & Drop Methods =====
    def _enable_drag_drop(self):
        """启用文件拖拽功能"""
        try:
            # 尝试使用 tkinterdnd2 (推荐)
            from tkinterdnd2 import DND_FILES, TkinterDnD
            # 需要先初始化 TkinterDnD
            TkinterDnD().load_tk()
            self.drop_target_register(DND_FILES)
            self.dnd_bind('<<Drop>>', self._on_drop)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragEnter>>', self._on_drag_enter)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragLeave>>', self._on_drag_leave)
        except Exception:
            # 如果没有 tkinterdnd2 或初始化失败，尝试使用 Windows 原生支持
            self._setup_windows_drop()

    def _setup_windows_drop(self):
        """设置 Windows 原生拖拽支持"""
        try:
            import ctypes
            from ctypes import wintypes

            # 定义 Windows API
            WM_DROPFILES = 0x233
            GWL_WNDPROC = -4

            # 获取窗口句柄
            hwnd = wintypes.HWND(int(self.winfo_id()))

# ===== Drag & Drop Methods =====
    def _enable_drag_drop(self):
        """启用文件拖拽功能"""
        try:
            # 尝试使用 tkinterdnd2
            from tkinterdnd2 import DND_FILES, TkinterDnD
            # 初始化 TkinterDnD - 使用正确的初始化方式
            TkinterDnD.DnD(self).load_tk()
            self.drop_target_register(DND_FILES)
            self.dnd_bind('<<Drop>>', self._on_drop)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragEnter>>', self._on_drag_enter)
            self.dnd_bind('<<DragLeave>>', self._on_drag_leave)
            print("拖拽功能已启用 (tkinterdnd2)")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"tkinterdnd2 初始化失败: {e}，尝试使用Windows原生支持")
            # 如果没有 tkinterdnd2 或初始化失败，尝试使用 Windows 原生支持
            self._setup_windows_drop()
